mapper.insert: INSERT INTO po_order_bill_head ( fbill_no,fid, fdocument_status, fdate, fsupplier_id, fcreator_id, fcreate_date, fmodifier_id, fmodify_date, fapprover_id, fapprove_date, fcanceller_id, fcancel_date, fclose_status, fcloser_id, fclose_date, fbill_type_id, fsettle_id, fcharge_id, fprovider_id, fchanger_id, fchange_date, fchange_reason, fbusiness_type, fprovider_address, fassign_supplier_id, fconfirm_status, fconfirmer_id, fconfirm_date, fprovider_contact_id, fprovider_job, fprovider_phone, fsource_bill_no, fchange_status, facctype, fprovider_email, fclose_reason, fcontract_type, f_ypdd, f_ora_date, f_zlbz, f_zmtp1, f_zmtp2, f_zmtp3, f_zmtxm, f_zmms, f_cmtp1, f_cmtp2, f_cmms, f_cmtxm, f_bzbzjyq, f_kh, f_jjdbl, f_gxhth, f_khjc, f_zje, f_gdy1, f_ora_checkbox1, f_gcbz, f_xsy, f_khjqnew, f_shdd, f_yebz, fbggysyy, fjsfsjjq, fhttk13, fhttk510, f_cty_baseproperty1, f_cty_baseproperty2, fwcl, fzzqrjq, f_gyszh, f_settle_curr_id, f_exchange_type_id, f_exchange_rate, f_price_list_id, f_price_time_point, f_discount_list_id, f_deposit_ratio, f_deposit, f_all_discount, f_is_included_tax, f_is_price_exclude_tax, f_bill_amount, f_bill_tax_amount, f_bill_all_amount, f_local_curr_id, f_bill_amount_lc, f_bill_tax_amount_lc, f_bill_all_amount_lc, f_all_pay_apply_amount, f_all_pay_amount, f_all_apply_no_pay_amount, f_all_refund_amount, f_all_no_pay_amount, f_all_appy_no_pay_amount, f_pay_condition_id ) VALUES ( #{fbillNo},#{fid}, #{fdocumentStatus}, #{fdate}, #{fsupplierId}, #{fcreatorId}, #{fcreateDate}, #{fmodifierId}, #{fmodifyDate}, #{fapproverId}, #{fapproveDate}, #{fcancellerId}, #{fcancelDate}, #{fcloseStatus},#{fcloserId}, #{fcloseDate}, #{fbillTypeId}, #{fsettleId}, #{fchargeId}, #{fproviderId}, #{fchangerId}, #{fchangeDate}, #{fchangeReason}, #{fbusinessType}, #{fproviderAddress}, #{fassignSupplierId}, #{fconfirmStatus}, #{fconfirmerId}, #{fconfirmDate}, #{fproviderContactId}, #{fproviderJob}, #{fproviderPhone}, #{fsourceBillNo}, #{fchangeStatus}, #{facctype}, #{fproviderEmail}, #{fcloseReason}, #{fcontractType}, #{fYpdd}, #{fOraDate}, #{fZlbz}, #{fZmtp1}, #{fZmtp2}, #{fZmtp3}, #{fZmtxm}, #{fZmms}, #{fCmtp1}, #{fCmtp2}, #{fCmms}, #{fCmtxm}, #{fBzbzjyq}, #{fKh}, #{fJjdbl}, #{fGxhth}, #{fKhjc}, #{fZje}, #{fGdy1}, #{fOraCheckbox1}, #{fGcbz}, #{fXsy}, #{fKhjqnew}, #{fShdd}, #{fYebz}, #{fbggysyy}, #{fjsfsjjq}, #{fhttk13}, #{fhttk510}, #{fCtyBaseproperty1}, #{fCtyBaseproperty2}, #{fwcl}, #{fzzqrjq}, #{fGyszh}, #{fSettleCurrId}, #{fExchangeTypeId}, #{fExchangeRate}, #{fPriceListId}, #{fPriceTimePoint}, #{FDiscountListId}, #{fDepositRatio}, #{FDeposit}, #{FAllDisCount}, #{FIsIncludedTax}, #{FIspriceExcludetax}, #{fBillAmount}, #{fBillTaxAmount}, #{fBillAllAmount}, #{fLocalCurrId}, #{fBillAmountLc}, #{fBillTaxAmountLc}, #{FBillAllAmount_LC}, #{fAllPayApplyAmount}, #{fAllPayAmount}, #{fAllApplyNoPayAmount}, #{fAllRefundAmount}, #{fAllNoPayAmount}, #{FAllAppyNoPayAmount}, #{FPayConditionId} )
mapper.select: SELECT pbh.fbill_no, pbh.fdocument_status, pbh.fdate, sr.name as fsupplier_id, su.user_name as fcreator_id, pbh.fcreate_date, pbh.fmodifier_id, pbh.fmodify_date, pbh.fapprover_id, pbh.fapprove_date, pbh.fcanceller_id, pbh.fcancel_date, pbh.fclose_status, pbh.fcloser_id, pbh.fclose_date, bd.name as fbill_type_id, ser.name as fsettle_id, spr.name as fcharge_id, pbh.fchanger_id, pbh.fchange_date, pbh.fchange_reason, pbh.fbusiness_type, pbh.fprovider_address, pbh.fassign_supplier_id, pbh.fconfirm_status, pbh.fconfirmer_id, pbh.fconfirm_date, sc.contact_name as fprovider_contact_id, pbh.fprovider_job, pbh.fprovider_phone, pbh.fsource_bill_no, pbh.fchange_status, pbh.facctype, pbh.fprovider_email, pbh.fclose_reason, pbh.fcontract_type, pbh.f_ypdd, pbh.f_ora_date, pbh.f_zlbz, pbh.f_zmtp1, pbh.f_zmtp2, pbh.f_zmtp3, pbh.f_zmtxm, pbh.f_zmms, pbh.f_cmtp1, pbh.f_cmtp2, pbh.f_cmms, pbh.f_cmtxm, pbh.f_bzbzjyq, pbh.f_kh, pbh.f_jjdbl, pbh.f_gxhth, pbh.f_khjc, pbh.f_zje, se.fname as f_gdy1, pbh.f_ora_checkbox1, pbh.f_gcbz, sle.fname as f_xsy, pbh.f_khjqnew, pbh.f_shdd, pbh.f_yebz, pbh.fbggysyy, pbh.fjsfsjjq, pbh.fhttk13, pbh.fhttk510, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty1, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty2, pbh.fwcl, pbh.fzzqrjq, pbh.f_gyszh, bld.name as f_settle_curr_id, bldy.name as f_exchange_type_id, pbh.f_exchange_rate, pbh.f_price_list_id, pbh.f_price_time_point, pbh.f_discount_list_id, pbh.f_deposit_ratio, pbh.f_deposit, pbh.f_all_discount, pbh.f_is_included_tax, pbh.f_is_price_exclude_tax, pbh.f_bill_amount, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount, pbh.f_bill_all_amount, bldy.name as f_local_curr_id, pbh.f_bill_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_all_amount_lc, pbh.f_all_pay_apply_amount, pbh.f_all_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_apply_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_refund_amount, pbh.f_all_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_appy_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_pay_condition_id FROM po_order_bill_head pbh LEFT JOIN supplier sr on pbh.fsupplier_id=sr.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier ser on pbh.fsettle_id=ser.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier spr on pbh.fcharge_id=spr.supplierid LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pbh.fcreator_id=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pbh.fbill_type_id=bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on pbh.f_settle_curr_id=bld.kingdee and bld.category='currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy on pbh.f_local_curr_id=bldy.kingdee and bldy.category='currency' LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc on pbh.fprovider_contact_id=sc.defaultContact LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pbh.f_gdy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN sys_employee sle on pbh.f_xsy=sle.salesman_id WHERE pbh.fbill_no = #{fbillNo}

SELECT pbh.fbill_no, pbh.fdocument_status, pbh.fdate, sr.name as fsupplier_id, su.user_name as fcreator_id, pbh.fcreate_date, pbh.fmodifier_id, pbh.fmodify_date, pbh.fapprover_id, pbh.fapprove_date, pbh.fcanceller_id, pbh.fcancel_date, pbh.fclose_status, pbh.fcloser_id, pbh.fclose_date, bd.name as fbill_type_id, ser.name as fsettle_id, spr.name as fcharge_id, pbh.fchanger_id, pbh.fchange_date, pbh.fchange_reason, pbh.fbusiness_type, pbh.fprovider_address, pbh.fassign_supplier_id, pbh.fconfirm_status, pbh.fconfirmer_id, pbh.fconfirm_date, sc.contact_name as fprovider_contact_id, pbh.fprovider_job, pbh.fprovider_phone, pbh.fsource_bill_no, pbh.fchange_status, pbh.facctype, pbh.fprovider_email, pbh.fclose_reason, pbh.fcontract_type, pbh.f_ypdd, pbh.f_ora_date, pbh.f_zlbz, pbh.f_zmtp1, pbh.f_zmtp2, pbh.f_zmtp3, pbh.f_zmtxm, pbh.f_zmms, pbh.f_cmtp1, pbh.f_cmtp2, pbh.f_cmms, pbh.f_cmtxm, pbh.f_bzbzjyq, pbh.f_kh, pbh.f_jjdbl, pbh.f_gxhth, pbh.f_khjc, pbh.f_zje, se.fname as f_gdy1, pbh.f_ora_checkbox1, pbh.f_gcbz, sle.fname as f_xsy, pbh.f_khjqnew, pbh.f_shdd, pbh.f_yebz, pbh.fbggysyy, pbh.fjsfsjjq, pbh.fhttk13, pbh.fhttk510, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty1, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty2, pbh.fwcl, pbh.fzzqrjq, pbh.f_gyszh, bld.name as f_settle_curr_id, bldy.name as f_exchange_type_id, pbh.f_exchange_rate, pbh.f_price_list_id, pbh.f_price_time_point, pbh.f_discount_list_id, pbh.f_deposit_ratio, pbh.f_deposit, pbh.f_all_discount, pbh.f_is_included_tax, pbh.f_is_price_exclude_tax, pbh.f_bill_amount, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount, pbh.f_bill_all_amount, bldy.name as f_local_curr_id, pbh.f_bill_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_all_amount_lc, pbh.f_all_pay_apply_amount, pbh.f_all_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_apply_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_refund_amount, pbh.f_all_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_appy_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_pay_condition_id FROM po_order_bill_head pbh LEFT JOIN supplier sr on pbh.fsupplier_id=sr.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier ser on pbh.fsettle_id=ser.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier spr on pbh.fcharge_id=spr.supplierid LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pbh.fcreator_id=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pbh.fbill_type_id=bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on pbh.f_settle_curr_id=bld.kingdee and bld.category='currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy on pbh.f_local_curr_id=bldy.kingdee and bldy.category='currency' LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc on pbh.fprovider_contact_id=sc.defaultContact LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pbh.f_gdy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN sys_employee sle on pbh.f_xsy=sle.salesman_id WHERE pbh.id = #{id}

SELECT pbh.fbill_no, pbh.fdocument_status, pbh.fdate, sr.name as fsupplier_id, su.user_name as fcreator_id, pbh.fcreate_date, pbh.fmodifier_id, pbh.fmodify_date, pbh.fapprover_id, pbh.fapprove_date, pbh.fcanceller_id, pbh.fcancel_date, pbh.fclose_status, pbh.fcloser_id, pbh.fclose_date, bd.name as fbill_type_id, ser.name as fsettle_id, spr.name as fcharge_id, pbh.fchanger_id, pbh.fchange_date, pbh.fchange_reason, pbh.fbusiness_type, pbh.fprovider_address, pbh.fassign_supplier_id, pbh.fconfirm_status, pbh.fconfirmer_id, pbh.fconfirm_date, sc.contact_name as fprovider_contact_id, pbh.fprovider_job, pbh.fprovider_phone, pbh.fsource_bill_no, pbh.fchange_status, pbh.facctype, pbh.fprovider_email, pbh.fclose_reason, pbh.fcontract_type, pbh.f_ypdd, pbh.f_ora_date, pbh.f_zlbz, pbh.f_zmtp1, pbh.f_zmtp2, pbh.f_zmtp3, pbh.f_zmtxm, pbh.f_zmms, pbh.f_cmtp1, pbh.f_cmtp2, pbh.f_cmms, pbh.f_cmtxm, pbh.f_bzbzjyq, pbh.f_kh, pbh.f_jjdbl, pbh.f_gxhth, pbh.f_khjc, pbh.f_zje, se.fname as f_gdy1, pbh.f_ora_checkbox1, pbh.f_gcbz, sle.fname as f_xsy, pbh.f_khjqnew, pbh.f_shdd, pbh.f_yebz, pbh.fbggysyy, pbh.fjsfsjjq, pbh.fhttk13, pbh.fhttk510, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty1, pbh.f_cty_baseproperty2, pbh.fwcl, pbh.fzzqrjq, pbh.f_gyszh, bld.name as f_settle_curr_id, bldy.name as f_exchange_type_id, pbh.f_exchange_rate, pbh.f_price_list_id, pbh.f_price_time_point, pbh.f_discount_list_id, pbh.f_deposit_ratio, pbh.f_deposit, pbh.f_all_discount, pbh.f_is_included_tax, pbh.f_is_price_exclude_tax, pbh.f_bill_amount, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount, pbh.f_bill_all_amount, bldy.name as f_local_curr_id, pbh.f_bill_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_tax_amount_lc, pbh.f_bill_all_amount_lc, pbh.f_all_pay_apply_amount, pbh.f_all_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_apply_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_refund_amount, pbh.f_all_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_all_appy_no_pay_amount, pbh.f_pay_condition_id FROM po_order_bill_head pbh LEFT JOIN supplier sr on pbh.fsupplier_id=sr.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier ser on pbh.fsettle_id=ser.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier spr on pbh.fcharge_id=spr.supplierid LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pbh.fcreator_id=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pbh.fbill_type_id=bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld on pbh.f_settle_curr_id=bld.kingdee and bld.category='currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy on pbh.f_local_curr_id=bldy.kingdee and bldy.category='currency' LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc on pbh.fprovider_contact_id=sc.defaultContact LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pbh.f_gdy1=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN sys_employee sle on pbh.f_xsy=sle.salesman_id ORDER BY pbh.fcreate_date DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO po_order_bill_head ( fbill_no,fid, fdocument_status, fdate, fsupplier_id, fcreator_id, fcreate_date, fmodifier_id, fmodify_date, fapprover_id, fapprove_date, fcanceller_id, fcancel_date, fclose_status, fcloser_id, fclose_date, fbill_type_id, fsettle_id, fcharge_id, fprovider_id, fchanger_id, fchange_date, fchange_reason, fbusiness_type, fprovider_address, fassign_supplier_id, fconfirm_status, fconfirmer_id, fconfirm_date, fprovider_contact_id, fprovider_job, fprovider_phone, fsource_bill_no, fchange_status, facctype, fprovider_email, fclose_reason, fcontract_type, f_ypdd, f_ora_date, f_zlbz, f_zmtp1, f_zmtp2, f_zmtp3, f_zmtxm, f_zmms, f_cmtp1, f_cmtp2, f_cmms, f_cmtxm, f_bzbzjyq, f_kh, f_jjdbl, f_gxhth, f_khjc, f_zje, f_gdy1, f_ora_checkbox1, f_gcbz, f_xsy, f_khjqnew, f_shdd, f_yebz, fbggysyy, fjsfsjjq, fhttk13, fhttk510, f_cty_baseproperty1, f_cty_baseproperty2, fwcl, fzzqrjq, f_gyszh, f_settle_curr_id, f_exchange_type_id, f_exchange_rate, f_price_list_id, f_price_time_point, f_discount_list_id, f_deposit_ratio, f_deposit, f_all_discount, f_is_included_tax, f_is_price_exclude_tax, f_bill_amount, f_bill_tax_amount, f_bill_all_amount, f_local_curr_id, f_bill_amount_lc, f_bill_tax_amount_lc, f_bill_all_amount_lc, f_all_pay_apply_amount, f_all_pay_amount, f_all_apply_no_pay_amount, f_all_refund_amount, f_all_no_pay_amount, f_all_appy_no_pay_amount, f_pay_condition_id ) VALUES
( #{item.fbillNo}, #{item.fid}, #{item.fdocumentStatus}, #{item.fdate}, #{item.fsupplierId}, #{item.fcreatorId}, #{item.fcreateDate}, #{item.fmodifierId}, #{item.fmodifyDate}, #{item.fapproverId}, #{item.fapproveDate}, #{item.fcancellerId}, #{item.fcancelDate}, #{item.fcloseStatus}, #{item.fcloserId}, #{item.fcloseDate}, #{item.fbillTypeId}, #{item.fsettleId}, #{item.fchargeId}, #{item.fproviderId}, #{item.fchangerId}, #{item.fchangeDate}, #{item.fchangeReason}, #{item.fbusinessType}, #{item.fproviderAddress}, #{item.fassignSupplierId}, #{item.fconfirmStatus}, #{item.fconfirmerId}, #{item.fconfirmDate}, #{item.fproviderContactId}, #{item.fproviderJob}, #{item.fproviderPhone}, #{item.fsourceBillNo}, #{item.fchangeStatus}, #{item.facctype}, #{item.fproviderEmail}, #{item.fcloseReason}, #{item.fisCreateStraightOutIn}, #{item.fcontractType}, #{item.fYpdd}, #{item.fOraDate}, #{item.fZlbz}, #{item.fZmtp1}, #{item.fZmtp2}, #{item.fZmtp3}, #{item.fZmtxm}, #{item.fZmms}, #{item.fCmtp1}, #{item.fCmtp2}, #{item.fCmms}, #{item.fCmtxm}, #{item.fBzbzjyq}, #{item.fKh}, #{item.fJjdbl}, #{item.fGxhth}, #{item.fKhjc}, #{item.fZje}, #{item.fGdy1}, #{item.fOraCheckbox1}, #{item.fGcbz}, #{item.fXsy}, #{item.fKhjqnew}, #{item.fShdd}, #{item.fYebz}, #{item.fbggysyy}, #{item.fjsfsjjq}, #{item.fhttk13}, #{item.fhttk510}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty1}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty2}, #{item.fwcl}, #{item.fzzqrjq}, #{item.fGyszh}, #{item.fSettleCurrId}, #{item.fExchangeTypeId}, #{item.fExchangeRate}, #{item.fPriceListId}, #{item.fPriceTimePoint}, #{item.FDiscountListId}, #{item.fDepositRatio}, #{item.FDeposit}, #{item.FAllDisCount}, #{item.FIsIncludedTax}, #{item.FIspriceExcludetax}, #{item.fBillAmount}, #{item.fBillTaxAmount}, #{item.fBillAllAmount}, #{item.fLocalCurrId}, #{item.fBillAmountLc}, #{item.fBillTaxAmountLc}, #{item.FBillAllAmount_LC}, #{item.fAllPayApplyAmount}, #{item.fAllPayAmount}, #{item.fAllApplyNoPayAmount}, #{item.fAllRefundAmount}, #{item.fAllNoPayAmount}, #{item.FAllAppyNoPayAmount}, #{item.FPayConditionId} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fdocument_status = VALUES(fdocument_status), fdate = VALUES(fdate), fsupplier_id = VALUES(fsupplier_id), fpurchaser_group_id = VALUES(fpurchaser_group_id), fcreator_id = VALUES(fcreator_id), fcreate_date = VALUES(fcreate_date), fmodifier_id = VALUES(fmodifier_id), fmodify_date = VALUES(fmodify_date), fapprover_id = VALUES(fapprover_id), fapprove_date = VALUES(fapprove_date), fcanceller_id = VALUES(fcanceller_id), fcancel_date = VALUES(fcancel_date), fclose_status = VALUES(fclose_status), fpurchaser_id = VALUES(fpurchaser_id), fcloser_id = VALUES(fcloser_id), fclose_date = VALUES(fclose_date), fbill_type_id = VALUES(fbill_type_id), fsettle_id = VALUES(fsettle_id), fcharge_id = VALUES(fcharge_id), fprovider_id = VALUES(fprovider_id), fchanger_id = VALUES(fchanger_id), fchange_date = VALUES(fchange_date), fchange_reason = VALUES(fchange_reason), fbusiness_type = VALUES(fbusiness_type), fprovider_address = VALUES(fprovider_address), fassign_supplier_id = VALUES(fassign_supplier_id), fconfirm_status = VALUES(fconfirm_status), fconfirmer_id = VALUES(fconfirmer_id), fconfirm_date = VALUES(fconfirm_date), fprovider_contact_id = VALUES(fprovider_contact_id), fprovider_job = VALUES(fprovider_job), fprovider_phone = VALUES(fprovider_phone), fsource_bill_no = VALUES(fsource_bill_no), fchange_status = VALUES(fchange_status), facctype = VALUES(facctype), fprovider_email = VALUES(fprovider_email), fclose_reason = VALUES(fclose_reason), fcontract_type = VALUES(fcontract_type), f_ypdd = VALUES(f_ypdd), f_ora_date = VALUES(f_ora_date), f_zlbz = VALUES(f_zlbz), f_zmtp1 = VALUES(f_zmtp1), f_zmtp2 = VALUES(f_zmtp2), f_zmtp3 = VALUES(f_zmtp3), f_zmtxm = VALUES(f_zmtxm), f_zmms = VALUES(f_zmms), f_cmtp1 = VALUES(f_cmtp1), f_cmtp2 = VALUES(f_cmtp2), f_cmms = VALUES(f_cmms), f_cmtxm = VALUES(f_cmtxm), f_bzbzjyq = VALUES(f_bzbzjyq), f_kh = VALUES(f_kh), f_jjdbl = VALUES(f_jjdbl), f_gxhth = VALUES(f_gxhth), f_khjc = VALUES(f_khjc), f_zje = VALUES(f_zje), f_gdy1 = VALUES(f_gdy1), f_ora_checkbox1 = VALUES(f_ora_checkbox1), f_gcbz = VALUES(f_gcbz), f_xsy = VALUES(f_xsy), f_khjqnew = VALUES(f_khjqnew), f_shdd = VALUES(f_shdd), f_yebz = VALUES(f_yebz), fbggysyy = VALUES(fbggysyy), fhttk13 = VALUES(fhttk13), fhttk510 = VALUES(fhttk510), f_cty_baseproperty1 = VALUES(f_cty_baseproperty1), f_cty_baseproperty2 = VALUES(f_cty_baseproperty2), fwcl = VALUES(fwcl), fzzqrjq = VALUES(fzzqrjq), f_gyszh = VALUES(f_gyszh), f_settle_curr_id = VALUES(f_settle_curr_id), f_exchange_type_id = VALUES(f_exchange_type_id), f_exchange_rate = VALUES(f_exchange_rate), f_price_list_id = VALUES(f_price_list_id), f_price_time_point = VALUES(f_price_time_point), f_discount_list_id = VALUES(f_discount_list_id), f_deposit_ratio = VALUES(f_deposit_ratio), f_deposit = VALUES(f_deposit), f_all_discount = VALUES(f_all_discount), f_is_included_tax = VALUES(f_is_included_tax), f_is_price_exclude_tax = VALUES(f_is_price_exclude_tax), f_bill_amount = VALUES(f_bill_amount), f_bill_tax_amount = VALUES(f_bill_tax_amount), f_bill_all_amount = VALUES(f_bill_all_amount), f_local_curr_id = VALUES(f_local_curr_id), f_bill_amount_lc = VALUES(f_bill_amount_lc), f_bill_tax_amount_lc = VALUES(f_bill_tax_amount_lc), f_bill_all_amount_lc = VALUES(f_bill_all_amount_lc), f_all_pay_apply_amount = VALUES(f_all_pay_apply_amount), f_all_pay_amount = VALUES(f_all_pay_amount), f_all_apply_no_pay_amount = VALUES(f_all_apply_no_pay_amount), f_all_refund_amount = VALUES(f_all_refund_amount), f_all_no_pay_amount = VALUES(f_all_no_pay_amount), f_all_appy_no_pay_amount = VALUES(f_all_appy_no_pay_amount), f_pay_condition_id = VALUES(f_pay_condition_id)
